author: lOrm
content: #665 closed. Added paths frontmatter field to SkillDefinition (#660 covers schema) and skill_matches_path() public matcher in src/skills.rs. Implements shell-style glob semantics: * matches single path segment, ** matches across segments, ? matches one non-slash char, **/ matches zero-or-more intermediate dirs. Invalid patterns log warn and skip without panicking. Inline regex translator avoids pulling a new glob crate dependency. 2 unit tests pin: glob semantics across nested + bare-toml + non-match cases, and invalid-glob graceful failure. Touched-file event integration (the activation trigger) is a separate concern owned by the event-dispatch layer.
